eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Okanogan, WA; at 7:10 AM on JUN 8, 2019 Effective until 8:10 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is a test, only a test of the Emergency Alert System in Okanogan County. 

 If this had been a real emergency, you would have been instructed what to do.  

The following tones will conclude this test.
